mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.city_name FROM monitor_station s LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC

SELECT s.*, c.city_name FROM monitor_station s LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id
AND (s.station_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.station_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.city_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
SELECT s.*, c.city_name FROM monitor_station s LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_station(station_name, station_code, city_id, address, longitude, latitude, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{stationName}, #{stationCode}, #{cityId}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
